name: python3-infinity
title: python3-infinity
description:
all-in-one infinity value for Python
This package provides an all-in-one infinity value for Python. The infinity
"inf" object can then be compared to any other Python object, or used in math
expressions.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-infinity because all-in-one infinity value for Python.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-infinity as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-infinity with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-infinity --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
